menu.title: RuneShell
menu.subtitle: Terminal deckbuilder
menu.footer: Use arrows to choose, Enter to confirm, q to quit
class.title: Choose Class
class.footer: Enter to start, Esc to go back
multiplayer.menu.title: Multiplayer
multiplayer.menu.subtitle: Create or join a LAN room.
multiplayer.menu.footer: Enter to confirm, Esc to go back
multiplayer.create.title: Create Multiplayer Room
multiplayer.create.subtitle: Confirm your name, class, and port before hosting.
multiplayer.join.title: Join Multiplayer Room
multiplayer.join.subtitle: Enter the host address, then confirm your name and class.
multiplayer.create.name: Your name: {value}
multiplayer.create.force_new.no: No, prefer resuming the previous room
multiplayer.join.name: Your name: {value}
multiplayer.placeholder.name: Choose a local display name
multiplayer.create.help.1: Create flow is simple: enter your name, confirm class and port, then choose Create room now.
multiplayer.create.help.2: After hosting, you go straight into the multiplayer room. Other local players can join with your LAN address and port.
multiplayer.create.help.3: For local testing on one machine, keeping port 7777 is usually enough and the other window can join 127.0.0.1:7777.
multiplayer.create.help.5: Use Up/Down to move. Left/Right changes class or toggles options. When name or port is selected, type directly and use Backspace to edit.
multiplayer.join.help.1: Joining only needs three things: the room address, your name, and the class you want to bring.
multiplayer.join.help.2: The room address is usually the host LAN IP and port, for example 127.0.0.1:7777 for local testing.
multiplayer.join.help.3: If you reconnect after a disconnect, keep the same player name so the room can restore your previous seat.
multiplayer.join.help.4: Use Up/Down to move. Left/Right changes class. When address or name is selected, type directly and use Backspace to edit.
progression.title: Meta Progression
progression.subtitle: Meta currency {currency} | {page} | tab cycles panels
progression.footer: Press Enter to apply the current action, Esc to return to the main menu
progression.perk.next_purchase: The next purchase costs {cost} meta currency.
progression.perk.next_value: After buying, this perk will rise to {value}.
progression.loadout.hint: Press Enter to cycle to the next unlocked option.
progression.settings.hint: Press Enter to switch the UI language. This first pass covers system UI surfaces; content asset text will move to localized resources later.
